title: Is Extremely Fast Works Really Well When
sourceTitle: Is Extremely Fast Works Really Well When
prompt:
is extremely fast and works really well when you want to generate new design ideas from a text prompt.

But when it comes to complex design workflows, it struggles.

Things like:
• creating furniture layouts from a 2D floor plan...
